---
title: "Visualize CHD2 separate models"
output: html_document
date: Sys.Date()
---


## Read model results for CHD2 het 409B
```{r}
read_model_output <- function(file_paths) {
  
  list_of_dfs <- lapply(file_paths, function(file) {
    df <- read.csv(file, row.names = 1)
    filename <- basename(file)
    label <- sub("^(?:[^_]*_){4}", "",  filename)
    label <- sub("\\.csv$", "", label)
    df$assay <- label
    df
  })

  combined_df <- do.call(rbind, list_of_dfs)
  return(combined_df)
}

setwd('CHD2/CHD2_CRISPR_vsAll/')
csv_files <- list.files(pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names=TRUE)
CHD2_het409B <- read_model_output(csv_files)
```

## Read model results for CHD2 patient 2
```{r}
setwd('CHD2/CHD2_P2/')

csv_files <- list.files(pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names=TRUE)

CHD2_P2 <- read_model_output(csv_files)
```


## Read model results for CHD2 patien 3
```{r}
setwd('CHD2/CHD2_P3')

csv_files <- list.files(pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names=TRUE)

CHD2_P3 <- read_model_output(csv_files)
```


## Check signficant hits
```{r}
CHD2_het409B_sign <- CHD2_het409B[CHD2_het409B$p.adj < 0.05,]
CHD2_P2_sign <- CHD2_P2[CHD2_P2$p.adj < 0.05,]
CHD2_P3_sign <- CHD2_P3[CHD2_P3$p.adj < 0.05,]

dim(CHD2_het409B_sign)
dim(CHD2_P2_sign)
dim(CHD2_P3_sign)
```


## Overlap of these
```{r}
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
VennDiagram::venn.diagram(
  x = list(CHD2_het409B_sign$feature, 
           CHD2_P2_sign$feature, 
           CHD2_P3_sign$feature),
  category.names = c("CHD2_CRISPR", "CHD2_P2", "CHD2_P3"),
  fill = c("red", "green", "blue"),
  filename = "CHD2_VennDiagram.png",
  output=TRUE
)

```


## Which feature is shared by all?
```{r}
intersect(CHD2_het409B_sign$feature, 
              CHD2_P2_sign$feature)

# MTEF_HUMAN, Transcription termination factor 4, mitochondrial
```


## Which omics types are among the shared features in P2 and P3?
```{r}
intersection_P2_P3 <- intersect(CHD2_P3_sign$feature, 
                                CHD2_P2_sign$feature)
table(CHD2_P2_sign[CHD2_P2_sign$feature %in% intersection_P2_P3, "assay"])
```


##
```{r}

```
